title: hybanthus parviflorus
intro: Hybanthus parviflorus, also known as the green and gold or narrow-leaf green and gold, is a perennial flowering plant native to eastern Australia. The plant has been traditionally used in medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Hybanthus parviflorus include reducing pain and inflammation, as well as treating fever, coughs, and colds, due to its expectorant and bronchodilator properties. The plant can be used to prepare various herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
